summary: Dependabot updater container exited with status 1 after determining that no security update was needed for the dependency 'rand', which was recorded as a 'security_update_not_needed' error.
root_cause: The Dependabot updater recorded an error of type 'security_update_not_needed' for dependency 'rand' after resolving that "no security update needed as rand is no longer vulnerable", and the updater container then failed with exit code 1.

evidence.quote: no security update needed as rand is no longer vulnerable
evidence.reason: Shows the updater determined the rand dependency no longer required a security update.
Log table shows an error entry with type 'security_update_not_needed'.

evidence.quote: Dependabot encountered '1' error(s) during execution, please check the logs for more details.
evidence.reason: Indicates Dependabot treated the situation as an error and reported a failure.

evidence.quote: Failure running container 4d986eac50248057b7f3fa031163542ffb36990efbcff66eb3aed0e408c150fa: Error: Command failed with exit code 1: /bin/sh -c $DEPENDABOT_HOME/dependabot-updater/bin/run update_files
evidence.reason: Shows the updater process/container exited with a non-zero exit code, causing the job to fail.

evidence.quote: For more information see: https://github.com/rust-lang/cargo/network/updates/1333710739 (write access to the repository is required to view the log)
evidence.reason: Points to the detailed Dependabot update job log (requires repo write access) for further investigation.

suggested_fix: Inspect the Dependabot update job log at https://github.com/rust-lang/cargo/network/updates/1333710739 (grant write access if needed) to confirm why 'security_update_not_needed' was recorded as an error. If this is expected (no update required), adjust Dependabot settings or the updater to treat 'security_update_not_needed' as a non-fatal outcome, or re-run the updater with configuration that doesn't mark this condition as a failure.
